name: Spicy Chicken and Pumpkin Stew
recipeIngredient: 6 cups peeled, seeded pumpkin in 1-inch cubes
1/4 cup Chopped fresh coriander or parsley
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into 1-1/2 inch (4 cm) cubes.
2. In a large heavy pot over medium-high heat, heat half of the oil.
3. Brown the chicken in batches, sprinkling lightly with salt and pepper. Remove the chicken using a slotted spoon and add more oil as needed.
4. After all chicken is browned and removed, add onion, garlic, red pepper, jalapeno, and ginger to the pan. Cook, stirring for 3 minutes over medium heat.
5. Add curry powder and cook, stirring for 1 minute.
6. Stir in coconut milk.
7. Return the chicken pieces and any accumulated juice back into the pot. Bring to a simmer; cover and cook for 20 minutes.
8. Add pumpkin. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes or until the pumpkin is tender. Taste and adjust seasoning.
9. Stir in coriander or parsley before serving. This colorful stew pairs well with rice and can be accompanied by sauteed spinach or green peas. Any winter squash could be substituted for the pumpkin.
Title: Spicy Chicken And Pumpkin Stew
